tasks.label: GCP: Login to Application Default Credentials
GCP: Fetch GROQ_API_KEY and save to .env
tasks.command: export SECRET_KEY=$(curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $(gcloud auth print-access-token)" "https://secretmanager.googleapis.com/v1/projects/543095975317/secrets/GROQ_API_KEY/versions/1:access" | jq -r .payload.data | base64 --decode) && echo "GROQ_API_KEY=$SECRET_KEY" > services/ai-service/.env && echo "✅ Secret successfully saved to services/ai-service/.env"
